Notice Of Hearing Re: Plaintiffs Petition For An Order Approving Distribution Of Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Oct-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DARNELL WITHROW Notice of Hearing Re: Plaintiff's Petition for an Order Approving Distribution of Settlement Funds. Appearances: Matthew Kracht, of Murphy Pearson (415) 788-1900 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DARNELL WITHROW Motion to Substitute Personal Representative for Deceased Plaintiff and for Leave to File Amended Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
